response: To provide extra time for a candidate, find their profile in 'Candidates', add the required time (53 minutes in this case), and then reinvite them. The email template may still show the original duration, but the candidate will have the additional time when taking the assessment.

issue: [{"role": "user", "content": "i signed up using google login on devplatform community , so i do not have a separate devplatform password. please delete my account"}]
response: To delete your DevPlatform Community account, you need to set a password first. Follow these steps: 1. Go to devplatform.com/login, 2. Click 'Forgot your password?', 3. Enter your email, 4. Check your inbox for the reset link, 5. Set a new password. After setting a password, you can delete your account by logging in, clicking your profile icon, selecting 'Settings', scrolling to 'Delete Account', and following the prompts.
justification: The user signed up using Google login and does not have a separate DevPlatform password. According to the documentation, the user must set a password before deleting their account.
